meta.summary: Bracken 3.1 abundance-estimation runtime with Bracken helper scripts and bundled Kraken 2 runtime support for user-provided Kraken databases.
meta.description: Bracken 3.1 abundance-estimation runtime with Bracken helper scripts and bundled Kraken 2 runtime support for user-provided Kraken databases.

test: bracken -v 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'Bracken v3.0.1' >/dev/null && bracken-build -v 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'bracken-build.sh v3.0.1' >/dev/null && test "$(cat /opt/bracken/share/doc/bracken/UPSTREAM_TAG)" = 'v3.1' && kraken2 --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'Kraken version 2.17.1' >/dev/null

bracken -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: bracken' >/dev/null && bracken-build -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: bracken_build' >/dev/null && python /opt/bracken/src/est_abundance.py -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Input kraken report file' >/dev/null && python /opt/bracken/src/generate_kmer_distribution.py -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Kraken counts file' >/dev/null && python /opt/bracken/analysis_scripts/combine_bracken_outputs.py -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Bracken output files' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-bracken-workflow-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; /opt/bracken/test-fixtures/bracken_smoke.sh "$tmp" && test -s "$tmp/sample.bracken" && test -s "$tmp/sample.bracken.report" && test -s "$tmp/combined.tsv" && test -s "$tmp/tiny.kmer_distrib" && grep -F 'Escherichia coli' "$tmp/sample.bracken" >/dev/null && grep -F 'S1_num' "$tmp/combined.tsv" >/dev/null && rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: Bracken
upstream.citation: Lu et al. Bracken: estimating species abundance in metagenomics data. PeerJ Computer Science 3:e104 (2017).
